title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving system stability and reliability behind the scenes. OpsPal now automatically detects and prevents common Salesforce configuration issues, including problems with Dynamic Forms and record type assignments that could block your workflows. The platform also got smarter about self-maintaining its components, reducing the chance of session startup errors.

entries.headline: Prevents Salesforce configuration errors that block workflows
details: OpsPal now detects when Dynamic Forms are active and prevents field changes that would cause invisible additions
System Administrator profiles automatically receive proper record type access to prevent reference errors
Workflow routing issues no longer block your sessions and instead show helpful guidance

entries.headline: OpsPal automatically maintains itself to prevent startup issues
details: The platform now checks for and installs missing components when you start a session
You'll see clear error messages and fix instructions if any maintenance issues occur

entries.headline: Eliminates false error messages during session startup
